name: DCERPC SMB Spoolss Named Pipe
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: OTR (Open Threat Research)
SIGMA Title: DCERPC SMB Spoolss Named Pipe
SIGMA Description: Detects the use of the spoolss named pipe over SMB. This can be used to trigger the authentication via NTLM of any machine that has the spoolservice enabled.

False positives:
- Domain Controllers acting as printer servers too? :)

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=5145 AND "Share Name"='\\*\IPC$' AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%spoolss%' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY DCERPC SMB Spoolss Named Pipe on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=5145 AND "Share Name"='\\*\IPC$' AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%spoolss%' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: DCERPC SMB Spoolss Named Pipe
